journeyIntro.overview: Marvel's Spider-Man 2 is a PS5-exclusive open-world action game featuring both Peter Parker and Miles Morales as playable Spider-Men across an expanded New York City. The platinum requires 100% district completion (all 160 collectibles and activities across 14 districts) plus a handful of combat and miscellaneous trophies. With zero missable trophies, no difficulty trophies, and all content available post-story, this is one of the most approachable platinums for a major superhero game.
journeyIntro.recommendedApproach: Play through the main story first to unlock both Spider-Men, all abilities, and all collectible types. After story completion, work district by district using the in-game map to reach 100% completion in each area — the Superior gold trophy and most silvers unlock automatically from this. Then mop up the few combat-specific trophies (Evolved, Armed and Dangerous, Slack Line, Overdrive, Surge) which track cumulative kills and may not be done naturally.
warnings: ZERO missable trophies — all side content and collectibles remain available after the main story ends
NO difficulty-related trophies — play on any difficulty including Friendly Neighborhood (easiest) and still earn the platinum
The Superior trophy (100% completion) requires ALL 160 collectibles across all 14 districts — use the in-game district map to track what you are missing
Spider-Bots (43 total) are NOT marked on the map — they emit a visible pink pulse and must be found by exploration or guide
Grains of Sand requires completing all 14 Marko's Memories AND then visiting a specific door in Astoria for the final cutscene
Surge trophy: you must use Symbiote Abilities specifically DURING Symbiote Surge (while the surge is active) — regular symbiote ability use outside of the surge does not count
Some collectibles unlock mid-story (Spider-Bots require completing 'Spider-Spy?' mission; Marko's Memories require 'One Thing at a Time' mission) — do not worry if they don't appear immediately

trophies.name: Dedicated
trophies.guide: Earn all 41 other trophies to unlock the Platinum. With no missable content, no difficulty requirements, and a 2/10 difficulty rating, this is one of the most accessible platinums on PS5.
trophies.walkthrough: Complete the main story, then work toward 100% district completion for the Superior trophy. Clean up remaining combat trophies and miscellaneous tasks. The platinum follows naturally from thorough exploration.

trophies.name: Superior
trophies.guide: Reach 100% completion in all 14 districts of New York City. This requires finding all 160 collectibles and completing all district activities — Spider-Bots, Photo Ops, Marko's Memories, FNSM Requests, EMF Experiments, Prowler Stashes, Hunter Blinds, Hunter Bases, Symbiote Nests, Mysteriums, Brooklyn Visions, Cultural Museum activities, and Unidentified Targets.
trophies.walkthrough: After completing the main story, open the in-game map and switch to the District View. Each district shows a completion percentage. Work through each district systematically, completing every icon. Spider-Bots are unmarked — use their pink pulse to find them. The Superior trophy unlocks once all 14 districts reach 100%.
prerequisites: Complete main story to unlock all collectible types

checklist.label: Astoria — 100%
checklist.notes: Marko's Memories final door is here

trophies.name: Heal the World
trophies.guide: Complete all 33 main story missions. This is the narrative completion trophy, unlocking after the final cutscene.
trophies.walkthrough: Play through the entire main campaign. The story involves both Peter and Miles dealing with Kraven the Hunter, the Lizard, and ultimately the Venom symbiote as it transforms Peter. The finale involves a climactic battle for New York.

trophies.name: Amazing
trophies.guide: Reach level 60, the maximum character level. XP is earned from completing missions, defeating enemies, and collecting items. This unlocks automatically as a byproduct of achieving 100% completion.
trophies.walkthrough: You will reach level 60 naturally while working toward the Superior trophy. If you complete all story missions, side content, and collectibles, you'll be max level before or right at 100% completion.
trophies.farmingTip: Keep clearing crimes and Mysteriums even after completing story content — they contribute steady XP.

trophies.name: To the Max
trophies.guide: Purchase all 5 gadget upgrade tiers for both Spider-Men using Tech Parts and other resources. Gadget upgrades are bought from the Gadgets menu.
trophies.walkthrough: Tech Parts are collected from crimes, challenges, Unidentified Targets, and by simply picking them up across the city. Gadgets include Web Shooters, Spider-Drones, Ricochet Web, and others. Fully upgrading all gadgets costs approximately 4,495 Tech Parts total plus other crafting resources.
trophies.farmingTip: Complete Unidentified Targets (Data Collector trophy activities) for large Tech Part rewards. Crimes and Mysteriums also drop good amounts.

trophies.name: Kitted Out
trophies.guide: Purchase every suit available in the Suits menu for both Peter Parker and Miles Morales. Suits cost City Tokens which are earned from Photo Ops and other city activities.
trophies.walkthrough: Open the Suits menu and purchase every unlocked suit for both Spider-Men. Suits are unlocked progressively through story completion and district activities. City Tokens are the main currency — earn them by completing Photo Ops (23 total) and other city challenges.
trophies.farmingTip: Completing all 23 Photo Ops is the best source of City Tokens for purchasing suits.

trophies.name: Behind the Masks
trophies.guide: Complete the final Mysterium challenge called 'Grand Finale'. Mysteriums are combat arena challenges hosted by Mysterio scattered across New York. Complete all of them to unlock and finish the Grand Finale.
trophies.walkthrough: Mysterium icons appear on the map after story progression. Each Mysterium involves a combat challenge with specific scoring requirements. Complete all available Mysteriums to unlock the Grand Finale boss encounter. The trophy pops upon completing this final challenge.

checklist.label: Grand Finale (Final Mysterium)
checklist.notes: Trophy pops on completion of this final encounter

trophies.name: Data Collector
trophies.guide: Complete all Unidentified Targets activities across New York to unlock the final mission 'Target Identified'. These activities involve tracking and studying mysterious spider-related phenomena.
trophies.walkthrough: Unidentified Target icons appear on the map after story progression. Each one involves scanning or interacting with a target in the environment. Completing all of them unlocks the bonus 'Target Identified' mission. Complete that mission to earn the trophy.

trophies.name: Crimson Hour
trophies.guide: Complete all The Flame side missions to unlock and finish the final mission 'It Was Meant for Me'. The Flame is a cult storyline tied to Kraven the Hunter's influence in the city.
trophies.walkthrough: The Flame mission icons appear on the map after story progression. These are story-driven side missions involving a cult. Complete the entire mission chain, culminating in the 'It Was Meant for Me' finale mission. Trophy unlocks upon completing this final mission.

trophies.name: Exterminator
trophies.guide: Find and destroy all 10 Symbiote Nests scattered across New York City. Symbiote Nests are infestation points that appear on the map after story progression. Each nest involves clearing symbiote enemies and destroying the nest core.
trophies.walkthrough: Symbiote Nest icons appear on the map after the symbiote storyline begins in the main quest. Visit each nest icon, eliminate all symbiote enemies in the area, and destroy the pulsating nest core. All 10 nests must be cleared for the trophy.
prerequisites: Story progression to unlock Symbiote Nests

trophies.name: Grains of Sand
trophies.guide: Collect all 14 Marko's Memories crystals scattered across New York AND then visit the specific door in Astoria that the quest points to for the final cutscene. Simply collecting all 14 crystals is not enough — you must trigger the ending.
trophies.walkthrough: Marko's Memories unlock during the main story mission 'One Thing at a Time'. The 14 crystals appear as collectible icons on the map. After collecting all 14, a quest marker appears in Astoria pointing to a specific door. Interact with the door to trigger a cutscene and earn the trophy.
prerequisites: Complete main story mission 'One Thing at a Time' to unlock collectibles

checklist.label: Visit the Astoria door (final cutscene)
checklist.location: Astoria — follow quest marker after collecting all 14
checklist.notes: REQUIRED — collecting all 14 without visiting this door will NOT pop the trophy

trophies.name: Seek and Destroy
trophies.description: Complete all Hunter Blinds and Bases
trophies.guide: Find and clear all 11 Hunter Blinds (sniper outposts) and 4 Hunter Bases (fortified camps) across the city. These are Kraven's hunter outposts controlling territory in New York.
trophies.walkthrough: Hunter Blinds and Bases appear on the map after story progression. Hunter Blinds involve taking out hidden snipers and dismantling the outpost. Hunter Bases are larger combat encounters with multiple enemy waves before you can destroy the base structure. Clear all 15 locations for the trophy.
prerequisites: Story progression to unlock Hunter activity icons

trophies.name: Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man
trophies.guide: Complete all 6 FNSM (Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man) app requests — personal citizen help requests that appear throughout the game. These are short, often heartwarming side missions.
trophies.walkthrough: FNSM requests appear on the map as phone icons. Each is a short side mission with a unique story scenario involving New York citizens who need Spider-Man's help. Complete all 6 requests for the trophy. The 'Howard' request in the Financial District also triggers the separate 'A New Adventure' bronze trophy.

checklist.label: FNSM Request — Howard (Financial District)
checklist.notes: Also triggers the 'A New Adventure' bronze trophy

trophies.name: Leave Us Alone
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 25 'Don't Be Scared' — a pivotal moment in the symbiote storyline.
trophies.walkthrough: Simply continue playing the main story. This trophy is awarded for completing a major story milestone — no special actions required beyond progressing the narrative.

trophies.name: The Great Hunt
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 24 'Anything Can Be Broken' — a key confrontation in the Kraven the Hunter storyline.
trophies.walkthrough: Continue playing the main story. This is awarded for completing a major boss encounter or story milestone. No side objectives required.

trophies.name: Medicine
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 20 'It Chose You' — a pivotal symbiote-related story moment.
trophies.walkthrough: Simply continue the main story. This milestone trophy awards itself at a dramatic narrative turn in the second half of the game.

trophies.name: Surge
trophies.description: Use Symbiote Abilities 25 times during Symbiote Surge
trophies.guide: As Peter Parker, activate Symbiote Surge (the special symbiote supercharge mode) and then use Symbiote Abilities 25 times WHILE the Surge is active. Regular symbiote ability use outside of Surge does not count toward this trophy.
trophies.walkthrough: Symbiote Surge is activated by building up the Surge meter during combat (it fills as you use symbiote abilities). Once activated, press the designated button to enter Surge mode. In Surge mode, use your Symbiote Abilities (hold L2 + face buttons for Peter) repeatedly. Each ability use counts as one. Enemies keep spawning at crime scenes and Mysteriums — use those locations for reliable farming.
trophies.farmingTip: Find a crime or Mysterium with continuous enemy spawns. Activate Surge, burn through abilities quickly, let the Surge expire, rebuild it, and repeat.

trophies.name: Foundational
trophies.guide: Complete all 9 EMF (Electromagnetic Field) Experiments scattered across New York. These are science-based mini-challenges tied to Dr. Connors' (The Lizard's) research.
trophies.walkthrough: EMF Experiment icons appear on the map after story progression. Each experiment involves a unique mini-game or challenge — some involve physics puzzles, others involve chasing energy patterns. Complete all 9 for the trophy.
prerequisites: Story progression to unlock EMF Experiments

trophies.name: Evolved
trophies.description: Defeat 100 enemies with Evolved Venom abilities
trophies.guide: As Miles Morales, use any of his Evolved Venom Bio-Electric abilities to land the killing blow on 100 enemies total. Only kills count — hits that do not finish an enemy do not progress the counter.
trophies.walkthrough: Miles's Evolved Venom abilities are his supercharged bioelectric powers unlocked through skill progression in the second half of the game. Use these abilities (hold L2 + face buttons for Miles) to finish enemies. Crimes, Mysteriums, and Hunter Blinds offer continuous enemy spawns for grinding.
prerequisites: Miles Morales Evolved Venom abilities (unlocked via skill tree mid-game)
trophies.farmingTip: Find a crime with constant enemy respawns and focus on using Evolved Venom moves for the finishing blow each time. Hunter Bases have high enemy density.

trophies.name: Armed and Dangerous
trophies.guide: As Peter Parker, use any of his Spider-Arm abilities to land the killing blow on 100 enemies total. Only kills with Spider-Arm abilities count — incidental damage does not.
trophies.walkthrough: Peter's Spider-Arms are mechanical tentacle-like limbs unlocked through his skill tree in the second half of the game. Use Spider-Arm abilities (hold L2 + face buttons for Peter in Spider-Arms mode) to finish enemies. Same farming method as the Evolved trophy — find reliable enemy spawn locations.
prerequisites: Peter Parker Spider-Arm abilities (unlocked via skill tree in second half of story)
trophies.farmingTip: Hunter Bases and Mysteriums offer dense enemy encounters — good for farming ability kills efficiently.

trophies.name: You're Gonna Need Help
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 1 'Surface Tension' — the very first main quest of the game. This is likely the first trophy you will earn.
trophies.walkthrough: Simply play the opening main quest. No additional actions required. This sets up the story and introduces the combat system.

trophies.name: A New Suit
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically when Peter obtains the Black Suit during Main Quest 15 'Good Men'. No player action required beyond story progression.
trophies.walkthrough: Continue through the main story until the symbiote bonding sequence in Main Quest 15. The trophy pops at this dramatic story moment.

trophies.name: Another Way
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 23 'No Escape' — a pivotal narrative turning point in the second act.
trophies.walkthrough: Simply continue the main story. This trophy represents a significant story development involving the symbiote's influence on Peter.

trophies.name: I Quit
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically upon completing Main Quest 28 'Set Things Right' — a key story moment in the final act.
trophies.walkthrough: Continue through the main story. This is awarded during the climactic final act of the game.

trophies.name: Antidote
trophies.guide: Story-related trophy. Unlocks automatically when you use the Anti-Venom Bomb during Main Quest 28. No special action required — the bomb use is part of the scripted story mission.
trophies.walkthrough: This trophy pops during the resolution of Main Quest 28 as part of the anti-symbiote story resolution. It happens automatically in the mission's scripted sequence.

trophies.name: Fully Loaded
trophies.guide: Purchase all Suit Tech upgrades from the Suit Tech menu. Suit Tech upgrades improve core abilities like Focus generation, health, combat skills, and traversal for both Spider-Men. Total cost is approximately 620 Tech Parts plus other resources.
trophies.walkthrough: Open the Suit Tech menu (accessible from pause menu) and purchase every available upgrade. These are distinct from gadget upgrades. You'll accumulate enough Tech Parts through normal play and 100% completion to afford all upgrades.

trophies.name: Brooklyn Pride
trophies.guide: Complete all Brooklyn Visions side missions, culminating in the final mission 'A Gift'. These are Miles Morales-centric missions tied to his community in Brooklyn.
trophies.walkthrough: Brooklyn Visions icons appear on the map in the Brooklyn area. These are narrative side missions involving Miles's personal connections. Complete the entire mission chain to unlock and finish 'A Gift', the finale mission of this storyline.

trophies.name: My Community
trophies.guide: Complete all Cultural Museum activities associated with Miles Morales, culminating in the final mission 'Hard Bop'. These activities celebrate Harlem's cultural heritage.
trophies.walkthrough: Cultural Museum activity icons appear on the map in the Harlem area. Complete each activity to progress toward the 'Hard Bop' finale event. These activities are tied to Miles's Puerto Rican heritage and the Harlem community.

trophies.name: Stylish
trophies.guide: Equip any suit style option after Main Quest 3. Suit styles are cosmetic variants of existing suits — open the Suits menu, select a suit you own, and apply any available style to it.
trophies.walkthrough: After completing Main Quest 3, open the pause menu, go to Suits, choose any owned suit, and apply a style option (colors, patterns, etc.). Trophy pops immediately.

trophies.name: Slack Line
trophies.description: Stealth takedown 25 enemies from Web Lines
trophies.guide: Perform 25 stealth takedowns on enemies while hanging from a Web Line. Web Lines are thick horizontal webs you can create between two walls or surfaces, allowing you to walk on them and perform hanging takedowns on enemies below.
trophies.walkthrough: Web Lines are unlocked in Main Quest 8. When near enemies, create a Web Line between two surfaces in the area. Move onto the line and position above an enemy. Press the stealth takedown button to hang down and eliminate them silently. Repeat across multiple encounters — this is cumulative across the entire game.
prerequisites: Web Line ability (unlocked in Main Quest 8)
trophies.farmingTip: Hunter Blinds are excellent for this trophy — they feature isolated enemies in elevated positions perfect for Web Line setups. Complete multiple blinds using only Web Line takedowns.

trophies.name: Hang Ten
trophies.description: Perform 30 air tricks in a row without touching the ground
trophies.guide: Execute 30 consecutive aerial tricks without landing on the ground. Air tricks are performed by pressing the trick button during free-falling or web-swinging acrobatics.
trophies.walkthrough: Find a tall building or use the web-swing and free-fall cycle to stay airborne. Tap the trick button repeatedly during air time. Each trick input counts. String together swings, launches, and dive-bombs to stay off the ground long enough for 30 tricks. Takes practice but is achievable with smooth swinging.
trophies.farmingTip: The Financial District's tall buildings give you height to stay airborne long enough. Use Web Wings (hold triangle) combined with web-swinging to extend air time.

trophies.name: Overdrive
trophies.description: Use Reverse Flux to pull 6+ enemies together simultaneously
trophies.guide: As Miles Morales, use the Reverse Flux ability to pull 6 or more enemies together simultaneously in a single use of the ability.
trophies.walkthrough: Reverse Flux is a Miles ability that creates a gravity vortex pulling nearby enemies together. Find a location with 6+ enemies grouped relatively nearby — Hunter Bases are ideal. Position yourself in the center of a cluster of enemies and activate Reverse Flux. If done correctly in a dense enemy group, all 6+ enemies are pulled together and the trophy pops.
prerequisites: Miles's Reverse Flux ability (unlock from skill tree)
trophies.farmingTip: Hunter Bases have the highest enemy density. Enter a base, wait for enemies to converge, then activate Reverse Flux from the middle of the group.

trophies.name: Home Run!
trophies.description: Run around all baseball bases at Big Apple Ballers Stadium
trophies.guide: Find the Big Apple Ballers baseball stadium in Queens and physically run around all four bases in order (like a home run). A fun Easter egg trophy.
trophies.walkthrough: The Big Apple Ballers Stadium is located in Queens. Land on the baseball diamond and run between all four bases — home plate, first base, second base, third base — in the correct baseball order. The trophy pops after touching all four.

trophies.name: Just Let Go
trophies.description: Collect the science trophy at a church tower in the Financial District
trophies.guide: As Miles Morales, find and collect a hidden science trophy placed at the top of a church tower in the Financial District. A short and sweet Easter egg trophy.
trophies.walkthrough: Look for a church in the Financial District with a tall bell tower. Climb or web-swing to the top of the tower. The science trophy collectible is located there — interact with it to collect it and pop the trophy.

trophies.name: You Know What to Do
trophies.guide: As Peter Parker, find and interact with Aunt May's gravestone in a Harlem graveyard. A touching tribute to Peter's late guardian from the first game.
trophies.walkthrough: Find the cemetery in Harlem. Locate Aunt May Parker's gravestone within the cemetery. Approach it as Peter Parker and press the interact button to trigger a brief moment of reflection. Trophy pops immediately.

trophies.name: Soar
trophies.description: Glide from Financial District to Astoria using only Web Wings and Wind Tunnels
trophies.guide: Complete a continuous glide from the Financial District all the way to Astoria using only Web Wings (deployed by holding Triangle) and Wind Tunnels — without touching the ground or web-swinging during the journey.
trophies.walkthrough: Start in the Financial District and deploy Web Wings by holding Triangle while in the air. Gain altitude using Wind Tunnels (visible as upward gusts) to stay airborne. Navigate northeast toward Astoria exclusively via gliding and riding wind tunnels. Do not web-swing — that resets the attempt. Takes a few tries to learn the optimal route.
prerequisites: Web Wings (available after early story progression)
trophies.farmingTip: Start from the roof of the tallest building in the Financial District for maximum initial altitude. Chain Wind Tunnels along the waterfront route to Astoria.

trophies.name: Splat
trophies.description: Fail a trick and land on the ground
trophies.guide: Intentionally fail an aerial trick and crash-land on the ground. A humorous trophy rewarding a moment of incompetence.
trophies.walkthrough: When in the air during a trick sequence, fail to follow through or input an impossible combination and let Spider-Man faceplant on the ground. Trophy pops on the embarrassing landing.

trophies.name: A New Adventure
trophies.guide: Complete the FNSM app request called 'Howard' located in the Financial District. This is a particularly memorable short side mission involving a pigeon named Howard.
trophies.walkthrough: Find the Howard FNSM request icon in the Financial District. This brief but charming mission involves helping a citizen and their beloved pigeon. Complete the mission for both this trophy and partial progress toward the Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man silver trophy.

trophies.name: Resourceful
trophies.guide: Collect a cumulative total of 10,000 Tech Parts across the entire game. Tech Parts are the main crafting currency used for gadget and suit tech upgrades.
trophies.walkthrough: Tech Parts are collected automatically from enemies, crimes, challenges, and scattered across the city. You will naturally accumulate 10,000 Tech Parts as a byproduct of reaching 100% completion. This is not a trophy you need to specifically grind.

trophies.name: Co-Signing
trophies.guide: Find and complete all 10 Prowler Stashes hidden across the city. Prowler Stashes are hidden supply caches left by Aaron Davis (the Prowler) for Miles Morales to find.
trophies.walkthrough: Prowler Stash icons appear on the map. Each stash requires playing as Miles Morales — when you find the stash location, scan the area with Miles's senses to find the secret entrance, then navigate a short environmental puzzle to reach the supply safe inside. Complete all 10 for the trophy.

checklist.label: Prowler Stash 1
checklist.location: Check map for icon — requires Miles Morales

trophies.name: New York, New York
trophies.guide: Complete all 23 Photo Ops scattered across New York City. Photo Ops are locations marked on the map where you must take a in-game photo of a landmark or interesting sight using the camera feature.
trophies.walkthrough: Photo Op icons appear on the map after the 'Show Me New York' quest teaches you the camera mechanic. Travel to each icon, open your camera (swipe up on the DualSense touchpad or via the pause menu), frame the specified landmark in the viewfinder, and take the photo. Completing all 23 also earns City Tokens useful for suit purchases.
prerequisites: 'Show Me New York' quest completion to unlock camera mechanic

trophies.name: Funky Wireless Protocols
trophies.description: Solve the mystery of the Spider-Bots' origin
trophies.guide: Collect all 43 Spider-Bots hidden across New York City. Spider-Bots are small collectible robots that are NOT marked on the map — they emit a pink pulse every few seconds which you use to track them down. Collecting all 43 reveals their mysterious origin story.
trophies.walkthrough: Spider-Bots unlock after completing the 'Spider-Spy?' main story mission. They are the game's most challenging collectibles to find as they have no map icons. Look for a pulsing pink/magenta energy wave emanating from somewhere nearby — follow the pulse to its source. They can be on rooftops, in alleys, on building ledges, or tucked behind objects.
prerequisites: Complete 'Spider-Spy?' main story mission to unlock Spider-Bots
trophies.farmingTip: The pulsing effect is the only indication of a Spider-Bot's presence. Slow down while web-swinging through areas and watch for the pulse. Use a dedicated Spider-Bot location guide for efficiency — finding all 43 without a guide takes hours.

checklist.label: Spider-Bots — Financial District
checklist.notes: Multiple per district — find using pink pulse

suggestedOrder.description: Play through all 33 main story missions. Enjoy the story and collect Tech Parts, City Tokens, and any obvious collectibles you encounter naturally. Do not worry about 100% yet — focus on the narrative first. Three silver trophies unlock automatically from story milestones. The Stylish and A New Suit trophies also pop mid-story.

Complete all narrative side mission chains: FNSM App Requests (6 total — includes Howard for A New Adventure), Brooklyn Visions missions (culminating in 'A Gift'), Cultural Museum activities (culminating in 'Hard Bop'), The Flame missions (culminating in 'It Was Meant for Me'), and Unidentified Targets (culminating in 'Target Identified'). These each have short storylines worth playing.

Work district by district using the map. Complete in each district: all Symbiote Nests (10 total), all Hunter Blinds (11) and Hunter Bases (4), all EMF Experiments (9), all Mysteriums including Grand Finale, all Prowler Stashes (10 — Miles only), all Photo Ops (23), all Marko's Memories (14 + Astoria door), and all Spider-Bots (43 — use a guide for these as they are not on the map).

suggestedOrder.phase: Upgrades — Suits, Gadgets, and Suit Tech (1–2 hours)
suggestedOrder.description: Use accumulated Tech Parts and City Tokens to purchase all Suit Tech upgrades (Fully Loaded), all gadget upgrades (To the Max), and all available suits (Kitted Out). These should be mostly funded by your natural playthrough resource accumulation.

Mop up the cumulative combat trophies. For Evolved: use Miles's Evolved Venom abilities for killing blows on 100 enemies. For Armed and Dangerous: use Peter's Spider-Arm abilities for killing blows on 100 enemies. For Surge: activate Peter's Symbiote Surge and use Symbiote Abilities 25 times during it. For Slack Line: set up Web Lines near enemies and stealth takedown 25 from them (Hunter Blinds are ideal). For Overdrive: as Miles, pull 6+ enemies with Reverse Flux simultaneously at a Hunter Base.

Mop up the remaining quick trophies: Hang Ten (30 consecutive air tricks), Soar (glide from Financial District to Astoria using only Web Wings and Wind Tunnels), Splat (intentionally crash land), Home Run! (run all baseball bases at Big Apple Ballers Stadium in Queens), Just Let Go (collect science trophy at Financial District church tower), You Know What to Do (interact with Aunt May's grave in Harlem). Also ensure Resourceful (10,000 Tech Parts) and Amazing (level 60) have popped by this point.
